title: lichen_l2.c lichen_l2_recv validates iface but not pkt
description: The lichen_l2_recv function checks iface for NULL (with ARG_UNUSED immediately after) but does not check pkt. Either both should be checked for consistency, or neither (trust Zephyr contract). See lichen_l2.c:274-281. Reference: project-LICHEN-1www.25.
